SetupGuide.title: Welcome! Let's get your store ready
SetupGuide.subtitle: Complete these quick steps to start providing automated skin care routines to your customers.

step1.title: Enable App Embed
step1.description: Activate the Skin Analysis extension in your theme editor to display the widget on your storefront.

step2.title: Customization
step2.description: Tailor the look and feel of the skin care widget to match your store's aesthetic.

step3.title: Upload Branding
step3.description: Add your logo and brand colors to ensure a seamless experience for your customers.

step4.title: Verify Product Mapping
step4.description: Match your catalog products to specific skin concerns and routine steps.

SetupGuide.footer: Need more help? Check out our <DocumentationLink>Setup Guide Documentation</DocumentationLink> or <SupportLink>Contact Support</SupportLink>.

customize.title: Customize Widget
customize.description: Configure the skin analysis questions, visual results, and personalized product recommendations.

skinCare.title: Skin Care
skinCare.description: Configure the skin analysis questions, visual results, and personalized product recommendations.

hairCare.title: Hair Care
hairCare.description: Tailor the hair assessment questionnaire and treatment logic for various hair types and concerns.

widget.iconUrlHelp: URL to an image for your widget icon.

preview.title: Storefront Preview
preview.description: Interact with the widget to see the drawer animations and styles.
preview.mockMessage: Hello! Welcome to your digital consultation. Let's get started!
